title: erigeron laxiflorus
intro: Erigeron laxiflorus, also known as the daisy fleabane, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family, Asteraceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is said to have health benefits such as reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Erigeron laxiflorus include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and other remedies.
